sectiondef.header: IRQ Register offset for Versal 2VE and 2VM devices
Interrupt Enable/Disable/Mask/Status registers bit masks and shifts

briefdescription.para: IXR AXI write data error mask.
IXR AXI read data error mask.
IXR AXI read descriptor error mask.
IXR AXI write descriptor error mask.
IXR DST interrupt count overflow mask.
IXR SRC interrupt count overflow mask.
IXR byte count over flow mask.
IXR OR of all the interrupts mask.

detaileddescription.para: Or of XZDMA_IXR_AXI_WR_DATA_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_AXI_RD_DATA_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_AXI_RD_DST_DSCR_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_AXI_RD_SRC_DSCR_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_INV_APB_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_DMA_PAUSE_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_BYTE_CNT_OVRFL_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_SRC_ACCT_ERR_MASK, XZDMA_IXR_DST_ACCT_ERR_MASK

sectiondef.header: Channel Control0 register bit masks and shifts
Channel Control1 register bit masks and shifts
Channel Peripheral register bit masks and shifts
Channel Status register bit masks and shifts

briefdescription.para: ZDMA is busy in transfer mask.
ZDMA is in Pause state mask.

sectiondef.header: Channel Data Attribute register bit masks and shifts
Channel DSCR Attribute register bit masks and shifts
Channel Source/Destination Word0 register bit mask
Channel Source/Destination Word1 register bit mask
Channel Source/Destination Word2 register bit mask
Channel Source/Destination Word3 register bit masks and shifts
Channel Source/Destination start address or current payload
Channel Rate control count register bit mask
Channel Source/Destination Interrupt account count register bit mask

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
This macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the Xilinx base address of the ZDMA core.
is the register offset of the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XZDma_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes the value into the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the Xilinx base address of the ZDMA core.
is the register offset of the register.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XZDma_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
